steps.title: Identify the role of the coefficient
steps.content: The formula converts kelvins to Fahrenheit. Substitute $h=809.33$ and isolate the fraction: $$809.33-32=\frac{9(u-273.15)}{5}.$$

steps.title: Interpret in context
steps.content: So $777.33=\frac{9(u-273.15)}{5}$, giving $u-273.15=\frac{5\cdot 777.33}{9}=431.85$ and $u=705$. The answer is 705.
